title: matricaria broussonetii
intro: Matricaria broussonetii, also known as Guayacán or Broussonetia, is a type of flowering plant native to the Canary Islands and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting the healing of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Matricaria broussonetii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
